texto: In great deeds, something abides. On great fields, something stays. Forms change and pass; bodies disappear; but spirits linger, to consecrate ground for the vision-place of souls… generations that know us not and that we know not of, heart-drawn to see where and by whom great things were suffered and done for them, shall come to this deathless field, to ponder and dream; and lo! the shadow of a mighty presence shall wrap them in its bosom, and the power of the vision pass into their souls.
explicacao: Citação de Joshua Lawrence Chamberlain sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “In great deeds, something abides. On great fields, something stays. Forms change and pass; bodies…” articula motivacao, remembrance, visions em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.
